name_cn:
【Top Grade Factory】
MCM Aren ESSENTIAL
Mini#Boston Pillow Bag
Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
Shoulder, Crossbody, Handheld Officially Available
This mini Boston bag offers a fresh take on the classic style, made from classic Visetos material, paying tribute to MCM's roots in travel. Its silhouette recalls a weekend bag with clean lines and a convenient extended zipper. Exquisite craftsmanship, with the top handle hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted.
Item No.: F081
Model: MWBAASE03CO001
Size: 18*8*9.5cm
Strap: 102-118cm
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾
